text: How does the automatic adjustment mechanism move the economy to potential real gross domestic product (GDP) in the long run when current real GDP is above potential GDP?

options.A: Nominal wages fall, shifting the short-run aggregate supply curve to the right.
options.B: Nominal wages fall, shifting the short-run aggregate supply curve to the left.
options.C: Nominal wages do not change, shifting the short-run aggregate supply curve to the right.
options.D: Nominal wages rise, shifting the short-run aggregate supply curve to the right.
options.E: Nominal wages rise, shifting the short-run aggregate supply curve to the left.
